creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
This may shed some light on this users problem:
aside from my logs showing that everthing compiles fine in a tinderbox 
(a fresh formatted virtual box), I can't help him.



-------- Original Message --------
Date: 	Mon, 14 May 2012 06:14:18 -0700
From: 	jimmey prestwood <jimmey@verseonthego.com>
Reply-To: 	jimmey prestwood <jimmey@verseonthego.com>
To: 	scheidell@FreeBSD.org <scheidell@FreeBSD.org>



Hey Michael,
I have not asked for help on this issue! I have stated a fact and logged 
it into your system. You that is FreeBSD has some issues  that is 
symptomatic with the ports software.  The ISO image I retrieved for 
FreeBSD 9.0 out of the box did not compile KDE 3 or 4 or gnome2 on a 
clean box. The only desktop to compile was xfce4. I suggest that someone 
take a look at the images available to the masses for download from the web.
Suggestions, you don't attack the barrier of bad news, clean your 
systems up and install from a fresh formated box to test.
Cordially,
Jimmey Prestwood
The Prestwood's
